creator: kab00m@lich.phys.spbu.ru
text:
Created attachment 170333
Make output

opensips 2.1.2 won't compile on sparc64 platform, but 2.1.0 build was successful.

After many warnings compilation failed in

Makefile.rules:25: recipe for target 'net/net_udp.o' failed
gmake[1]: *** [net/net_udp.o] Error 1

Full log attached.

Compilation was done on 10.3-STABLE, latest ports as of May, 10, upgraded via svn. Hardware is Sun v240, dual-core UltraSparc IIIi.

FreeBSD acronis 10.3-STABLE FreeBSD 10.3-STABLE #1 r299059: Wed May  4 15:53:43 MSK 2016     toor@acronis:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  sparc64
